message:
🐛 Fix Demo Mode pill truncation in navbar (#1071)

Replace fixed w-[5.5rem] with px-3 + whitespace-nowrap so the pill
auto-sizes to fit its content. "Demo Mode" label was being cut off.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
